article_title: Apple unveils new iPhone lineup as analysts turn upbeat
explanation: Headline signals a strong product launch with positive analyst sentiment which supports an upward move.

article_title: Tesla recalls vehicles over software glitch
explanation: Recall and software fault are negative catalysts that typically push the stock lower the next session.

article_title: Nvidia announces stock split as shares hold steady
explanation: A stock split does not change fundamentals so little next-day movement is expected.
A clear subscriber beat is a positive surprise that drives the stock higher.
Model predicted neutral but a product delay is a negative catalyst so the down move was missed.
Model leaned up yet easing supply concerns were already priced in so the move stayed flat.
